title: Water Color Sorting
description: In Water Color Sorting, players blend hues within bottles to achieve a single color per container. Exercise your strategic thinking as you mix colors, ensuring each bottle holds only one distinct hue. With escalating complexity, this game offers a captivating challenge. Can you master the art of color blending and achieve perfect sorting? Web Dev https://www.funcrazygames.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
